description:
You are working as a localisation engineer.  
  Inside the workstation you will find an SQLite-3 database located at  
  /home/user/projects/i18n/app_translations.db  

  1. First create a single-file backup copy of the database inside the folder  
     /home/user/projects/i18n/backups/  
     • The backup file MUST be named app_translations_20230401.db  

  2. Using nothing but the sqlite3 command-line client, connect to the working
     database (NOT the backup) and perform the following changes to the table
     named translations:

     a) Insert three brand-new Spanish (“es”) rows  
        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  
        language | key              | value             | updated_at  
        ---------+------------------+-------------------+----------------------  
        es       | welcome_message  | Bienvenido        | 2023-04-01 10:00:00  
        es       | logout_button    | Cerrar sesión     | 2023-04-01 10:05:00  
        es       | help_link        | Ayuda             | 2023-04-01 10:10:00  

     b) Update the existing French (“fr”) row whose key is help_link  
        • value      → Assistance  
        • updated_at → 2023-04-01 10:30:00  

     c) Delete the obsolete German (“de”) row whose key is deprecated_notice.

  3. After applying the changes, generate a small plain-text report containing
     the number of translation rows per language.  
     • The report file path MUST be
       /home/user/projects/i18n/translation_summary.log  
     • Each line must follow the exact format   LANG|COUNT  
     • Languages must appear in ascending alphabetical order.  
     • The file must end with a single trailing newline.  
       Example format (values will differ):  
       aa|5⏎  
       zz|2⏎  

  4. All actions (backup + database edits + report generation) can be achieved
     with roughly 5-10 terminal commands.  
     Do NOT print the whole database to the console; only generate the log
     file described above.

  Expected end-state that the automated tester will verify:
  • /home/user/projects/i18n/backups/app_translations_20230401.db exists and
    is a byte-for-byte copy of the original database *before* modification.
  • Table translations now contains the three new Spanish rows, the updated
    French row, and no longer contains the German deprecated_notice row.
  • /home/user/projects/i18n/translation_summary.log exists and contains four
    lines exactly, sorted alphabetically, each in LANG|COUNT format, ending in
    a newline.  The counts must match the live data inside the database.

  No root access is available, so stay inside /home/user.  Non-interactive
  sqlite3 usage (i.e. with SQL provided on the command line or piped in) is
  perfectly acceptable.
truth:
<!--
    Initial database state present when the container starts
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    File: /home/user/projects/i18n/app_translations.db

    CREATE TABLE translations (
        id         INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        language   TEXT NOT NULL,
        key        TEXT NOT NULL,
        value      TEXT NOT NULL,
        updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
    );

    Rows initially present (id is deterministic):

    id | language | key              | value        | updated_at
    ---+----------+------------------+--------------+--------------------------
     1 | en       | welcome_message  | Welcome      | 2023-01-10 12:00:00
     2 | fr       | welcome_message  | Bienvenue    | 2023-01-10 12:00:00
     3 | de       | welcome_message  | Willkommen   | 2023-01-10 12:00:00
     4 | fr       | help_link        | Aide         | 2023-01-15 09:00:00
     5 | de       | deprecated_notice| Veraltet     | 2023-01-20 15:00:00

    Directory structure pre-created with correct permissions:

      /home/user/projects/i18n/
      ├── app_translations.db
      └── backups/               (exists and writable by user)

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    Expected final database state AFTER agent work
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    Rows that must exist:

    id | language | key              | value          | updated_at
    ---+----------+------------------+----------------+--------------------------
     1 | en       | welcome_message  | Welcome        | 2023-01-10 12:00:00
     2 | fr       | welcome_message  | Bienvenue      | 2023-01-10 12:00:00
     3 | de       | welcome_message  | Willkommen     | 2023-01-10 12:00:00
     4 | fr       | help_link        | Assistance     | 2023-04-01 10:30:00
     6 | es       | welcome_message  | Bienvenido     | 2023-04-01 10:00:00
     7 | es       | logout_button    | Cerrar sesión  | 2023-04-01 10:05:00
     8 | es       | help_link        | Ayuda          | 2023-04-01 10:10:00

    Notes:
    • Row with id 5 (de, deprecated_notice) must be absent.
    • AUTOINCREMENT causes the new rows to take ids 6,7,8.

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    Expected report file for verification
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    Path: /home/user/projects/i18n/translation_summary.log
    Exact 4 lines, terminated by '\n':

    de|1
    en|1
    es|3
    fr|2

    (Trailing newline after the last line is mandatory.)

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    Backup verification
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    /home/user/projects/i18n/backups/app_translations_20230401.db must be an
    exact byte-wise duplicate of the original
    /home/user/projects/i18n/app_translations.db as it existed *before* any
    modification (i.e. containing ids 1-5 with their original values).

  -->
name: task_000000_c308062e
